title: swtich charset log does not match the status output and DDL execution result
description: ## Bug Report Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks! ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) ``` set character_set_connection=utf8; CREATE TABLE `t` ( `pk` bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `j` json DEFAULT NULL, `i` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `c` char(64) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`pk`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */ ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=30001; alter table t add index j((cast(j->'$.number[*]' as signed array))); show create table t; ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) `status` output should match the log, and `DDL` execution result should also match the log. ### 3. What did you see instead (Required) After executing the first query to set the charset, the log output below, I think it means `utf8mb4` is used as charset and `utf8mb4_bin` as the collation. ``` [2023/03/23 18:19:25.866 +08:00] [WARN] [collate.go:221] ["The collation utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci specified on connection is not supported when new collation is enabled, switch to the default collation: utf8mb4_bin"] ``` stauts output does not match the log after executing all query, ### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required) master +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | tidb_version() | +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | Release Version: v7.1.0-alpha-27-gb14af478dc-dirty Edition: Community Git Commit Hash: b14af478dc8af404c9dcb485248ee140e293725c Git Branch: muilti-index-with-charset UTC Build Time: 2023-03-23 10:16:22 GoVersion: go1.20.1 Race Enabled: false TiKV Min Version: 6.2.0-alpha Check Table Before Drop: false Store: unistore | +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ 1 row in set (0.00 sec)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `test_table` ( `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `data` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_bin;
ALTER TABLE `test_table` ADD INDEX idx_data ((CAST(`data` AS CHAR(100))));
key_bug_features: charset setting does not match DDL execution results
